items.title: Inside the big business of the creator economy, with the agents making it happen
items.summary: We’ve got another special episode of Decoder today, recorded at the Cannes Lions advertising festival in the South of France. I’m talking with Ali Berman and Raina Penchansky, who run the Creators div…

items.title: Nintendo will stop selling the original Switch in Europe next year
items.summary: Nintendo is making a new version of the Switch 2 with a replaceable battery in Europe - but its predecessor has a very different future. As part of an updated FAQ about revisions to Nintendo hardware…

items.title: How to reserve and change your WhatsApp username
items.summary: WhatsApp now lets users reserve usernames ahead of the feature’s full rollout, making it possible to connect without sharing a phone number once usernames go live.

items.title: Can Partiful keep the party going?
